calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Richard J. Alexander, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Friendship Village, Inc.
Allan Nunley, the Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Jessica Alexandra, Esq. appeared with defendants Amelia White and Erroll Holiday, III, who were placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed & served on December 5, 2008.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Mr. Alexander. In accordance with the agreement of the parties, defendants Amelia White and Erroll Holiday, III ("defendants") shall vacated the premises located at 844 Webster Street, #F, San Francisco, CA 94117 no later than 5:00 p.m. on February 28, 2009. Defendants shall return the keys to the subject premises to plaintiff Friendship Village, Inc. ("plaintiff") and remove their personal property. Defendants shall pay plaintiff the sum of $951.00 no later than 12:00 p.m. on December 31, 2008. Cecil McKay shall not return to the subject premises. In return, plaintiff waives the back due rent of $6,782.00, and shall provide defendants with a neutral reference if any inquires are made pertaining to defendants by prospective landlords. Each party shall bear there own fees and costs. Defendants forfeit their security deposit of $720.00.

If defendants do not comply with the above-mentioned terms, plaintiff may, upon ex parte application with twenty-four hours notice, obtain judgment against defendants. If defendants comply with the terms of the agreement, plaintiff shall dismiss this action with prejudice.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed order to the Court not later than December 29, 2008.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Richard Alexander for Plaintiff Friendship Village, Inc.
Michael Dell, Limited Scope Attorney, for Defendant Amelia White, who present.

Settlement conference held. Case not settled. Trial date of 12/22/08 is maintained.

Judge Pro Tem Stan Blair, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
